verses.latin_vulgate: Miserere mei, Deus, secundum magnam misericordiam tuam ;  et secundum multitudinem miserationum tuarum, dele iniquitatem meam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חׇנֵּ֣נִי אֱלֹהִ֣ים כְּחַסְדֶּ֑ךָ כְּרֹ֥ב רַ֝חֲמֶ֗יךָ מְחֵ֣ה פְשָׁעָֽי׃
verses.king_james: Have mercy upon me, O God, according to thy lovingkindness: according unto the multitude of thy tender mercies blot out my transgressions.

verses.latin_vulgate: Amplius lava me ab iniquitate mea,  et a peccato meo munda me.
verses.king_james: Wash me throughly from mine iniquity, and cleanse me from my sin.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam iniquitatem meam ego cognosco,  et peccatum meum contra me est semper.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־פְ֭שָׁעַי אֲנִ֣י אֵדָ֑ע וְחַטָּאתִ֖י נֶגְדִּ֣י תָמִֽיד׃
verses.king_james: For I acknowledge my transgressions: and my sin is ever before me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tibi soli peccavi, et malum coram te feci ;  ut justificeris in sermonibus tuis,  et vincas cum judicaris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְךָ֤ לְבַדְּךָ֨ ׀ חָטָאתִי֮ וְהָרַ֥ע בְּעֵינֶ֗יךָ עָ֫שִׂ֥יתִי לְ֭מַעַן תִּצְדַּ֥ק בְּדׇבְרֶ֗ךָ תִּזְכֶּ֥ה בְשׇׁפְטֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: Against thee, thee only, have I sinned, and done this evil in thy sight: that thou mightest be justified when thou speakest, and be clear when thou judgest.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce enim in iniquitatibus conceptus sum,  et in peccatis concepit me mater mea.
verses.king_james: Behold, I was shapen in iniquity; and in sin did my mother conceive me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce enim veritatem dilexisti ;  incerta et occulta sapientiæ tuæ manifestasti mihi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֵן־אֱ֭מֶת חָפַ֣צְתָּ בַטֻּח֑וֹת וּ֝בְסָתֻ֗ם חׇכְמָ֥ה תוֹדִיעֵֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: Behold, thou desirest truth in the inward parts: and in the hidden part thou shalt make me to know wisdom.

verses.latin_vulgate: Asperges me hyssopo, et mundabor ;  lavabis me, et super nivem dealbabor.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תְּחַטְּאֵ֣נִי בְאֵז֣וֹב וְאֶטְהָ֑ר תְּ֝כַבְּסֵ֗נִי וּמִשֶּׁ֥לֶג אַלְבִּֽין׃
verses.king_james: Purge me with hyssop, and I shall be clean: wash me, and I shall be whiter than snow.

verses.latin_vulgate: Auditui meo dabis gaudium et lætitiam,  et exsultabunt ossa humiliata.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תַּ֭שְׁמִיעֵנִי שָׂשׂ֣וֹן וְשִׂמְחָ֑ה תָּ֝גֵ֗לְנָה עֲצָמ֥וֹת דִּכִּֽיתָ׃
verses.king_james: Make me to hear joy and gladness; that the bones which thou hast broken may rejoice.

verses.latin_vulgate: Averte faciem tuam a peccatis meis,  et omnes iniquitates meas dele.
verses.king_james: Hide thy face from my sins, and blot out all mine iniquities.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cor mundum crea in me, Deus,  et spiritum rectum innova in visceribus meis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֵ֣ב טָ֭הוֹר בְּרָא־לִ֣י אֱלֹהִ֑ים וְר֥וּחַ נָ֝כ֗וֹן חַדֵּ֥שׁ בְּקִרְבִּֽי׃
verses.king_james: Create in me a clean heart, O God; and renew a right spirit within me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ne projicias me a facie tua,  et spiritum sanctum tuum ne auferas a me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַל־תַּשְׁלִיכֵ֥נִי מִלְּפָנֶ֑יךָ וְר֥וּחַ קׇ֝דְשְׁךָ֗ אַל־תִּקַּ֥ח מִמֶּֽנִּי׃
verses.king_james: Cast me not away from thy presence; and take not thy holy spirit from me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Redde mihi lætitiam salutaris tui,  et spiritu principali confirma me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָשִׁ֣יבָה לִּ֭י שְׂשׂ֣וֹן יִשְׁעֶ֑ךָ וְר֖וּחַ נְדִיבָ֣ה תִסְמְכֵֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: Restore unto me the joy of thy salvation; and uphold me with thy free spirit.

verses.latin_vulgate: Docebo iniquos vias tuas,  et impii ad te convertentur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲלַמְּדָ֣ה פֹשְׁעִ֣ים דְּרָכֶ֑יךָ וְ֝חַטָּאִ֗ים אֵלֶ֥יךָ יָשֽׁוּבוּ׃
verses.king_james: Then will I teach transgressors thy ways; and sinners shall be converted unto thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Libera me de sanguinibus, Deus, Deus salutis meæ,  et exsultabit lingua mea justitiam tuam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַצִּ֘ילֵ֤נִי מִדָּמִ֨ים ׀ אֱֽלֹהִ֗ים אֱלֹהֵ֥י תְשׁוּעָתִ֑י תְּרַנֵּ֥ן לְ֝שׁוֹנִ֗י צִדְקָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: Deliver me from bloodguiltiness, O God, thou God of my salvation: and my tongue shall sing aloud of thy righteousness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Domine, labia mea aperies,  et os meum annuntiabit laudem tuam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲ֭דֹנָי שְׂפָתַ֣י תִּפְתָּ֑ח וּ֝פִ֗י יַגִּ֥יד תְּהִלָּתֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: O Lord, open thou my lips; and my mouth shall shew forth thy praise.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam si voluisses sacrificium, dedissem utique ;  holocaustis non delectaberis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י ׀ לֹא־תַחְפֹּ֣ץ זֶ֣בַח וְאֶתֵּ֑נָה ע֝וֹלָ֗ה לֹ֣א תִרְצֶֽה׃
verses.king_james: For thou desirest not sacrifice; else would I give it: thou delightest not in burnt offering.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sacrificium Deo spiritus contribulatus ;  cor contritum et humiliatum, Deus, non despicies.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זִ֥בְחֵ֣י אֱלֹהִים֮ ר֤וּחַ נִשְׁבָּ֫רָ֥ה לֵב־נִשְׁבָּ֥ר וְנִדְכֶּ֑ה אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים לֹ֣א תִבְזֶֽה׃
verses.king_james: The sacrifices of God are a broken spirit: a broken and a contrite heart, O God, thou wilt not despise.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benigne fac, Domine, in bona voluntate tua Sion,  ut ædificentur muri Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֵיטִ֣יבָה בִ֭רְצוֹנְךָ אֶת־צִיּ֑וֹן תִּ֝בְנֶ֗ה חוֹמ֥וֹת יְרוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.king_james: Do good in thy good pleasure unto Zion: build thou the walls of Jerusalem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tunc acceptabis sacrificium justitiæ, oblationes et holocausta ;  tunc imponent super altare tuum vitulos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָ֤ז תַּחְפֹּ֣ץ זִבְחֵי־צֶ֭דֶק עוֹלָ֣ה וְכָלִ֑יל אָ֤ז יַעֲל֖וּ עַל־מִזְבַּחֲךָ֣ פָרִֽים׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Then shalt thou be pleased with the sacrifices of righteousness, with burnt offering and whole burnt offering: then shall they offer bullocks upon thine altar.
